ddls:
CREATE TABLE "microbes" (
  "microbe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each microbe */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the microbe */,
  "taxID" INTEGER /* Taxonomic identifier */,
  "taxRank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., species, genus) */,
  "genomeSize" INTEGER /* Size of the genome in base pairs */,
  "numReads" INTEGER /* Total number of reads from sequencing */,
  "numUniqueReads" INTEGER /* Number of unique reads */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Relative abundance of the microbe in the sample */,
  "gcContent" REAL /* Percentage of guanine (G) and cytosine (C) nucleotides in the genome */,
  "gcSkew" REAL /* Measure of the difference between the number of G and C nucleotides */,
  "gcBias" REAL /* Measure of GC content bias in the genome */,
  "assemblyMethod" TEXT /* Method used for genome assembly */,
  "assemblyQuality" REAL /* Quality score of the genome assembly */,
  "publicationDate" TEXT /* Date when the microbe's data was published */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the microbe's data (e.g., draft, reviewed, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("microbe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_microbes_taxID FOREIGN KEY ("taxID") REFERENCES taxonomy ("taxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomy" (
  "taxID" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic entry */,
  "parent_taxID" INTEGER /* Identifier of the parent taxonomic entry */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Taxonomic rank (e.g., species, genus, family) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic entry */,
  "lineage" TEXT /* Full taxonomic lineage of the entry */,
  "commonName" TEXT /* Common name of the taxonomic entry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the taxonomic entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxID")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_data" (
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genomic sequence */,
  "microbe_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the microbe the sequence belongs to */,
  "sequence_data" TEXT /* The genomic sequence data */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the genomic sequence */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the sequence was uploaded */,
  "assemblyID" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the assembly version */,
  "sequencingPlatform" TEXT /* Platform used for sequencing */,
  "sequencingMethod" TEXT /* Method used for sequencing */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Sequencing coverage of the genome */,
  "qualityScore" REAL /* Quality score of the genomic sequence */,
  "publicAccess" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the sequence is publicly accessible */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the genomic data (e.g., NCBI, SRA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_data_microbe_id FOREIGN KEY ("microbe_id") REFERENCES microbes ("microbe_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "read_counts" (
  "read_count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each read count entry */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the genomic sequence */,
  "numReads" INTEGER /* Total number of reads from sequencing */,
  "numUniqueReads" INTEGER /* Number of unique reads */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Relative abundance of the sequence in the sample */,
  "readLength" INTEGER /* Average length of the reads */,
  "qualityScore" REAL /* Quality score of the reads */,
  "alignmentRate" REAL /* Percentage of reads that align to the reference genome */,
  "insertSize" INTEGER /* Average insert size of paired-end reads */,
  "mappingQuality" REAL /* Mapping quality score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("read_count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_read_counts_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("sequence_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the institution */,
  "researchFocus" TEXT /* Research focus or area of expertise */,
  "lastLogin" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sequence_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genomic sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analysis) */,
  "ipAddress" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "sessionID" TEXT /* Session identifier for the user's session */,
  "actionDetails" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action performed */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sequence_id FOREIGN KEY ("sequence_id") REFERENCES genomic_data ("sequence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
